title: selaginella atirrensis
intro: Selaginella atirrensis, also known as Atirrensis Spikemoss or Atirrensis Spike Moss, is a species of spikemoss in the family Selaginellaceae, a group of small, non-vascular plants that reproduce via spores. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella atirrensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, Selaginella atirrensis is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
